title: Default option for "Add Triggered Breakpoint" dialog
body: Type: Feature Request When clicking "Add Triggered Breakpoint..." we get a dialog to pick which breakpoint should be the trigger. The default option is "None". I think it would be really nice if the default option could be whatever breakpoint that is already added. The workflow today is this: * Add a breakpoint somewhere * Click "Add Triggered Breakpoint..." * Click the dropdown to select a trigger * Click OK I propose that the dropdown shouldn't have "None" as the default option The default should be whatever breakpoint that exists: This would be very helpful VS Code version: Code 1.117.0 (10c8e557c8b9f9ed0a87f61f1c9a44bde731c409, 2026-04-21T16:12:14-07:00) OS version: Linux x64 6.19.13-200.fc43.x86_64 Modes: Remote OS version: Linux x64 6.14.0-1017-azure
comments:
I’d like to take this one.

I’m going to keep the change scoped to the existing breakpoint widget logic: when the triggered-breakpoint dropdown is opened and valid trigger breakpoint candidates exist, it should default to the first available breakpoint while preserving existing `triggeredBy` selections and keeping `None` available as a clearing option.
